items.title_en: Dissident Hong Kong bookseller Lam Wing-kee dies aged 70
items.title_zh: 香港持不同政见书商林荣基去世，享年70岁
items.desc_en: Lam Wing-kee, who defied China by selling material critical of Beijing, passed away after suffering from lung cancer.
items.desc_zh: 因出售批评北京的材料而反抗中国的林永基因肺癌去世。

items.title_en: Stand-up comic held for jokes about Erdogan and Islam in Turkey crackdown

items.desc_zh: 欧洲顶级银行家和金融监管机构正在努力解决如何更好地监管人工智能风险的问题。

items.title_en: Ford achieves quality milestone, as CEO targets flawless new vehicle launches
items.title_zh: 福特实现质量里程碑，首席执行官目标是完美推出新车

items.title_en: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
items.title_zh: 特朗普的“自由 250”在其执政之前吸引了企业赞助商和企业
items.desc_en: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.
items.desc_zh: 与联邦利益相关的公司——包括波音、洛克希德·马丁和甲骨文——正在赞助一项与特朗普结盟的活动，庆祝美国 250 岁生日。

items.title_en: As ACA enrollment falls by millions, Trump administration and policy gurus disagree on why
items.title_zh: 随着 ACA 入学人数下降数百万人，特朗普政府和政策专家对于原因存在分歧
items.desc_en: Affordable Care Act marketplace enrollment has declined by 3 million people. The Trump administration points to fraud controls. Policy experts point to cost.
items.desc_zh: 《平价医疗法案》市场注册人数减少了 300 万人。特朗普政府指出了欺诈控制措施。政策专家指出成本。

items.title_en: American Express and Chase move luxury lounge wars beyond the airport
items.title_zh: 美国运通和大通将豪华休息室大战转移到机场之外
items.desc_en: Credit card companies are increasingly offering access to lounges and perks at festivals and sporting events, often exclusively for premium cardholders.
items.desc_zh: 信用卡公司越来越多地在节日和体育赛事期间提供休息室和福利，通常专门针对高级持卡人。

items.title_en: Manhattan luxury real estate sales hold firm despite fears of a 'Mamdani effect'
items.title_zh: 尽管担心“马姆达尼效应”，曼哈顿豪华房地产销售仍保持坚挺
items.desc_en: A month after the passage of a tax on second homes in New York City, brokers and analysts said sales of luxury real estate remain strong.
items.desc_zh: 纽约市第二套房税通过一个月后，经纪人和分析师表示，豪华房地产的销售仍然强劲。

items.desc_en: Monaco's prosecutor's office says the suspect is no longer in Monaco.
items.desc_zh: 摩纳哥检察官办公室表示，嫌疑人已不在摩纳哥。

items.title_en: Nasa launches mission to save falling space telescope
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局启动拯救坠落太空望远镜的任务
items.desc_en: A Nasa-funded robot has blasted off to catch a falling telescope in mid-orbit and blast it back to safety before it burns up.

items.title_en: At least 32 dead after overcrowded bus plunges into ravine in Pakistan

items.desc_en: The bus was travelling from Quetta to Peshawar, when it crashed in the Dana Sar mountain range.
items.desc_zh: 这辆巴士当时正从奎达开往白沙瓦，在达纳萨尔山脉坠毁。

items.title_en: Gold prices set for first weekly rise in a month as investors scale back Fed rate hike bets
items.title_zh: 随着投资者缩减美联储加息押注，金价将出现一个月来首次周上涨
items.desc_en: The metal was boosted as investors scaled back their bets on a looming rate hike.
items.desc_zh: 由于投资者缩减了对迫在眉睫的加息的押注，金价受到提振。

items.title_en: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
items.title_zh: 伊朗开始公开哀悼二月份遇害的阿亚图拉
items.desc_en: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.
items.desc_zh: 阿里·哈梅内伊的遗体将于周五起在德黑兰大摩萨拉安放，随后举行为期数天的葬礼。

items.title_en: Extreme heat wave threatens U.S. power grids and July 4 travel
items.title_zh: 极端热浪威胁美国电网和7月4日旅行
items.desc_en: The heat wave threatens to overwhelm U.S. grids and may force some to change their plans on one of the busiest travel weeks of the year.
items.desc_zh: 热浪可能会淹没美国电网，并可能迫使一些人在一年中最繁忙的旅行周之一改变计划。

items.title_en: Oman walks a diplomatic tightrope over Strait of Hormuz fees, creating a ‘blind spot’ for markets

items.title_en: 5 takeaways from President Donald Trump's interview with CNBC
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统接受 CNBC 采访的 5 个要点
items.desc_en: The president defended his family's business and said he feels bad that the presidency creates a conflict of interest in any of his children's investments.

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: A mayor in Japan announced her maternity leave - and got the whole country talking
items.title_zh: 日本市长宣布休产假，引起全国热议
items.desc_en: In the face of criticism, Shoko Kawata, 35, says she loves her job and is proud to be taking time off to have a baby.
items.desc_zh: 面对批评，35 岁的川田祥子 (Shoko Kawata) 表示，她热爱自己的工作，并为能抽出时间生孩子而感到自豪。

items.title_en: Ebola treatments trial begins in the Democratic Republic of Congo
items.title_zh: 埃博拉治疗试验在刚果民主共和国开始
items.desc_en: According to WHO data, there have been 1,406 confirmed cases of the disease in DRC, with 301 suspected cases and 438 deaths.
items.desc_zh: 根据世界卫生组织的数据，刚果民主共和国已有1,406例确诊病例，其中疑似病例301例，死亡438例。

items.title_en: Amazon has deployed enough satellites to launch Leo service later this year
items.title_zh: 亚马逊已部署足够的卫星，将于今年晚些时候推出 Leo 服务
items.desc_en: Leo will compete with SpaceX's Starlink, which had a four-year start over Amazon and has more than 10,000 satellites in its constellation.
items.desc_zh: Leo 将与 SpaceX 的 Starlink 竞争，后者比亚马逊早了四年，其星座中拥有超过 10,000 颗卫星。

items.title_en: Bomb blast at Damascus cafe kills six, Syrian state media say
items.title_zh: 叙利亚官方媒体称，大马士革咖啡馆发生爆炸，造成六人死亡
items.desc_en: There was no immediate claim for the bombing at a cafe close to the Palace of Justice, a major government building.
items.desc_zh: 目前还没有立即就发生在主要政府大楼司法宫附近的一家咖啡馆发生的爆炸事件提出索赔。

items.desc_zh: 与 GitHub Copilot 大声交谈

items.title_zh: Osloq

items.desc_zh: 为您重现 GitHub 问题的 AI 代理

items.title_en: Venezuela quake survivor pulled out alive after eight days
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震幸存者八天后生还
items.desc_en: Hernán Gil was trapped under a collapsed multi-storey car park, and encouraged them as they inched closer to him.
items.desc_zh: 埃尔南·吉尔被困在倒塌的多层停车场下，当他们慢慢靠近他时，他鼓励他们。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: At least 10 killed in large-scale Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯大规模导弹和无人机袭击基辅 至少10人死亡
items.desc_en: Russia launched its biggest strikes on the city in weeks with children among the "significant number" of casualties, Ukrainian officials say.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰官员表示，俄罗斯对该市发动了几周来最大规模的袭击，伤亡人数“相当多”是儿童。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: Wonka Netflix show faces backlash for AI-generated Gene Wilder voice
items.title_zh: Netflix 节目《旺卡》因人工智能生成吉恩·怀尔德声音而遭到强烈反对
items.desc_en: The actor, who died in 2016, appears in the Netflix show with the consent of his estate.
items.desc_zh: 这位于 2016 年去世的演员在得到其遗产管理人的同意后出现在 Netflix 节目中。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_zh: 为什么关键技术容易受到高温影响？

items.desc_zh: 能源网和火车服务是容易受到酷热天气影响的重要服务。

items.title_en: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
items.title_zh: 尽管英国道路禁令，电动滑板车仍在做通勤广告
items.desc_en: A Press Association investigation found major retailers advertising e-scooters for "commuting" and "urban riding".
items.desc_zh: 新闻协会的一项调查发现，主要零售商为“通勤”和“城市骑行”的电动滑板车做广告。

items.title_en: WhatsApp to let people chat without swapping phone numbers
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 让人们无需交换电话号码即可聊天
items.desc_en: The app's new usernames feature will be rolled out globally over the next few months.
items.desc_zh: 该应用程序的新用户名功能将在未来几个月内在全球推出。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
items.desc_en: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.
items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.title_en: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能
items.desc_en: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.
items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers
items.title_zh: 为什么《GTA 6》将在没有光盘的情况下启动 - 这对游戏玩家意味着什么
items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？
